Review:
The world building was... not great or nonexistent. I spent a good chunk of the first half of the book staring at the map in the front.

The book did hook me in and knowing that it will be a 5 book series I am hoping for more world building beyond the war college. I feel like the world building can get a pass because the first book is so localized.

The action scenes did make this a quick read, and I fell hard for the dragons. I am still going to read the second one because I cannot stop thinking about that last chapter and connecting it to previous chapters.

3.5 stars I think. I keep flip flopping.
